claim: For all integers n > 1, n is prime if and only if (n-1)! + 1 is divisible by n.
For all integers n > 1, if n is prime then (n-1)! is congruent to -1 modulo n.

For all integers n > 1, if n is prime then n divides both (n-1)! + 1 and n^5 - n.
